# WidgetVoice

> Embeddable feedback widget, public roadmap and changelog for product teams. Collect ideas, vote on features, and ship a public changelog in minutes.

WidgetVoice helps product teams gather user feedback directly on their website with a lightweight, customizable widget. Users can submit ideas, report bugs, vote on feature requests, and follow product updates through a public roadmap and changelog.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a free WidgetVoice account.
- [Log in](/login): Access your dashboard.
- [Website feedback examples](/examples): Guide and inspiration for collecting user feedback on your site.
